payload.answer: Existing memory says Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans; new information says Sam from Goldman also likes Sonny Rollins. This appears additive, not conflicting.
repair_options: add_new: Add Sonny Rollins as an additional liked artist for Sam from Goldman, keeping the existing Bill Evans preference unchanged.
keep_existing: Keep only the existing Bill Evans preference and do not add Sonny Rollins.
edit: Ask the user to clarify or edit Sam from Goldman’s music preferences before making any change.
